revision.text: {{YearInCountryPortalBox|{{{country}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|year={{{year}}}}}{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in {{#ifeq:{{{prefix}}}||'''[[{{#if: {{{countrydab}}} | {{{countrydab}}} | {{{country}}}}}|{{{country}}}]]'''|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|'''[[{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}]]'''|the '''[[{{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?(.*)$|replace=%1|count=1|plain=false}} {{{country}}}]]'''}}}}}}{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min}}}|max={{{max}}}}}{{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{{newnamestart}}} >= {{{year}}}|'''Note''': in {{{newnamestart}}}, {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}} was renamed to '''[[{{{newname}}}]]'''.}}}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat}}}|yes|| {{#ifeq: {{{subcountry}}}|yes|| {{#ifexist: Category:{{{year}}} by country|[[Category:{{{year}}} by country{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}[[Category:{{resolve category redirect|Years {{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury}}}|yes| in | of the {{Century name from decade or year|{{{year}}}}} in }} {{#if: {{{newnamestart}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor(({{{year}}} -1)/100)}} = {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/100)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor({{{year}}}/10)}} >= {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/10)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{{{year}}} in {{{continent1}}}|{{{country}}}]]{{#if:{{{continent2}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent2}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent3}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent3}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent4}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent4}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}__NOGALLERY__ {{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

{{YearInCountryPortalBox|{{{country}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|year={{{year}}}}}{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in {{#ifeq:{{{prefix}}}||'''[[{{#if: {{{countrydab}}} | {{{countrydab}}} | {{{country}}}}}|{{{country}}}]]'''|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|'''[[{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}]]'''|the '''[[{{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?(.*)$|replace=%1|count=1|plain=false}} {{{country}}}]]'''}}}}}}{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min}}}|max={{{max}}}}}{{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{{newnamestart}}} >= {{{year}}}|'''Note''': in {{{newnamestart}}}, {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}} was renamed to '''[[{{{newname}}}]]'''.}}}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat}}}|yes|| {{#ifeq: {{{subcountry}}}|yes|| {{#ifexist: Category:{{{year}}} by country|[[Category:{{{year}}} by country{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}[[Category:{{resolve category redirect|Years {{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury}}}|yes| in | of the {{Century name from decade or year|{{{year}}}}} in }} {{#if: {{{newnamestart}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor(({{{year}}} -1)/100)}} = {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/100)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor({{{year}}}/10)}} >= {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/10)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{{{year}}} in {{{continent1}}}|{{{country}}}]]{{#if:{{{continent2}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent2}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent3}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent3}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent4}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent4}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}__NOGALLERY__ {{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

?(.*)$|replace=%1|count=1|plain=false}} {{{country}}}]]'''}}}}}}{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min}}}|max={{{max}}}}}{{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{{newnamestart}}} >= {{{year}}}|'''Note''': in {{{newnamestart}}}, {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}} was renamed to '''[[{{{newname}}}]]'''.}}}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat}}}|yes|| {{#ifeq: {{{subcountry}}}|yes|| {{#ifexist: Category:{{year}}} by country|[[Category:{{year}}} by country{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}[[Category:{resolve category redirect|Years {{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury}}}|yes| in | of the {{Century name from decade or year|{{{year}}}}} in }} {{#if: {{{newnamestart}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor(({{{year}}} -1)/100)}} = {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/100)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{resolve category redirect|{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor({{{year}}}/10)}} >= {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/10)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{{year}}} in {{{continent1}}}|{{{country}}}]]{{#if:{{{continent2}}}|[[Category:{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent2}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent3}}}|[[Category:{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent3}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent4}}}|[[Category:{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent4}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}__NOGALLERY__ '''[[{{{newname}}}]]'''.}}}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat}}}|yes|| {{#ifeq: {{{subcountry}}}|yes|| {{#ifexist: Category:{year}}} by country|[[Category:{year}}} by country{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}[[Category:resolve category redirect|Years {{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury}}}|yes| in | of the {{Century name from decade or year|{{{year}}}}} in }} {{#if: {{{newnamestart}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor(({{{year}}} -1)/100)}} = {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/100)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:resolve category redirect|{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor({{{year}}}/10)}} >= {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/10)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{year}}} in {{{continent1}}}|{{{country}}}]]{{#if:{{{continent2}}}|[[Category:{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent2}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent3}}}|[[Category:{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent3}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent4}}}|[[Category:{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent4}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}__NOGALLERY__ revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

{{Year in country portal box|{{{country}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|year={{{year}}}}}{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in {{#ifeq:{{{prefix}}}||'''[[{{#if: {{{countrydab}}} | {{{countrydab}}} | {{{country}}}}}|{{{country}}}]]'''|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|'''[[{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}]]'''|the '''[[{{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?(.*)$|replace=%1|count=1|plain=false}} {{{country}}}]]'''}}}}}}{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|{{Category main article|{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min}}}|max={{{max}}}}}{{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{{newnamestart}}} >= {{{year}}}|'''Note''': in {{{newnamestart}}}, {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}} was renamed to '''[[{{{newname}}}]]'''.}}}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat}}}|yes|| {{#ifeq: {{{subcountry}}}|yes|| {{#ifexist: Category:{{{year}}} by country|[[Category:{{{year}}} by country{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}[[Category:{{resolve category redirect|Years {{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury}}}|yes| in | of the {{Century name from decade or year|{{{year}}}}} in }} {{#if: {{{newnamestart}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor(({{{year}}} -1)/100)}} = {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/100)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor({{{year}}}/10)}} >= {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/10)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{{{year}}} in {{{continent1}}}|{{{country}}}]]{{#if:{{{continent2}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent2}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent3}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent3}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent4}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent4}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}__NOGALLERY__ {{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

{{Year in country portal box|{{{country}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|year={{{year}}}}}{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in {{#ifeq:{{{prefix}}}||'''[[{{#if: {{{countrydab}}} | {{{countrydab}}} | {{{country}}}}}|{{{country}}}]]'''|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|'''[[{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}]]'''|the '''[[{{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?(.*)$|replace=%1|count=1|plain=false}} {{{country}}}]]'''}}}}}}{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|{{Category main article|{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min}}}|max={{{max}}}}}{{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{{newnamestart}}} >= {{{year}}}|'''Note''': in {{{newnamestart}}}, {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}} was renamed to '''[[{{{newname}}}]]'''.}}}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat}}}|yes|| {{#ifeq: {{{subcountry}}}|yes|| {{#ifexist: Category:{{{year}}} by country|[[Category:{{{year}}} by country{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}}}[[Category:{{resolve category redirect|Years {{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury}}}|yes| in | of the {{Century name from decade or year|{{{year}}}}} in }} {{#if: {{{newnamestart}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor(({{{year}}} -1)/100)}} = {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/100)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor({{{year}}}/10)}} >= {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/10)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]][[Category:{{{year}}} in {{{continent1}}}|{{{country}}}]]{{#if:{{{continent2}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent2}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{continent3}}}|[[Category:{{{year}}} in revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Year in country portal box|{{{country}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|year={{{year}}}}}{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in {{#ifeq:{{{prefix}}}||'''[[{{#if: {{{countrydab}}} | {{{countrydab}}} | {{{country}}}}}|{{{country}}}]]'''|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|'''[[{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}]]'''|the '''[[{{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?(.*)$|replace=%1|count=1|plain=false}} {{{country}}}]]'''}}}}}}{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|{{Category main article|{{{year}}} in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min}}}|max={{{max}}}}}{{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{{newnamestart}}} >= {{{year}}}|'''Note''': in {{{newnamestart}}}, {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}} was renamed to '''[[{{{newname}}}]]'''.}}}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat}}}|yes||
{{#ifeq: {{{subcountry}}}|yes|| {{#ifexist: Category:{{{year}}} by country|}}}}{{#if:{{{continent2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{continent3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{continent4}}}|}}}}__NOGALLERY__</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}
[[Category:{{{year}}} by country{{!}}{{{country}}}]] [[Category:{{resolve category redirect|Years  {{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury}}}|yes| in | of the {{Century name from decade or year|{{{year}}}}} in }} {{#if: {{{newnamestart}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor(({{{year}}} -1)/100)}} = {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/100)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]] [[Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in  {{#if: {{{newname}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{#expr: floor({{{year}}}/10)}} >= {{#expr: floor({{{newnamestart}}}/10)}}|{{{newname}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]] [[Category:{{{year}}} in {{{continent1}}}|{{{country}}}]] [[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent2}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]] [[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent3}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]] [[Category:{{{year}}} in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{continent4}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
